user_query: I want to explore different music genres, discover lesser-known artists, fetch details about Taylor Swift, learn a mathematical fact about 1729, and calculate the currency exchange rate from CAD to USD.

TaskList.description: Research and suggest a list of lesser-known music artists from various genres.
Fetch the details of the artist 'Taylor Swift'.
Retrieve an interesting mathematical fact about the number 1729.
Calculate the current currency exchange rate from CAD to USD.
